features.title: Codex Review Toggle
features.description: Add use_codex field (auto/off/on) to config.json and state.json. Update evaluator to check this field before Codex detection. Update commands/init.md with optional prompt. Update initializer to include the field.
steps: Verify config.json schema in patterns.md contains use_codex field with allowed values auto, off, on
Verify state.json schema in patterns.md contains use_codex field as legacy fallback
Verify agents/evaluator.md references use_codex before attempting Codex detection
Verify commands/init.md includes optional Codex toggle prompt
Verify agents/initializer.md sets use_codex in default config output
evidence: config.json schema in patterns.md contains use_codex field
evaluator agent+role uses 3-step codex detection from config.json
commands/init.md includes Codex toggle prompt
initializer creates config.json with use_codex

features.title: Cross-Domain Profiles with BA Foundation
features.description: Add domain profile system to SKILL.md with 7 built-in profiles (software, architecture, tender, research, content, business_analysis, custom). Add domain_profile and secondary_profile to state.json schema. Add source_requirement to features.json. Update planner, evaluator, init command, and README.
steps: Verify SKILL.md contains domain profiles section with all 7 built-in profiles
Verify state.json schema in patterns.md contains domain_profile and secondary_profile fields
Verify features.json schema in patterns.md contains source_requirement field
Verify agents/planner.md supports domain profile selection
Verify agents/evaluator.md uses profile-driven evaluation criteria
Verify commands/init.md includes domain profile prompt
Verify README.md contains domain profile table

features.title: Feature Dependencies
features.description: Add depends_on field (array of feature IDs) to features.json schema in patterns.md. Update coordinator to skip dependency-blocked features when selecting the next target.
steps: Verify features.json schema in patterns.md contains depends_on field as array of feature IDs
Verify agents/coordinator.md documents dependency-blocked feature skipping logic
Verify roles/coordinator.md references dependency checking in target selection
evidence: features.json schema in patterns.md contains depends_on field
coordinator agent selects features with dependency-aware logic
coordinator role references dependency checking in simplified loop and focus

features.title: Configurable Context Reset Threshold
features.description: Add context_reset_threshold field (default 3) to state.json schema in patterns.md. Update coordinator to read this field instead of using a hardcoded value. Update SKILL.md to document the field.
steps: Verify state.json schema in patterns.md contains context_reset_threshold field with default 3
Verify agents/coordinator.md references context_reset_threshold instead of hardcoded value
Verify SKILL.md documents the context_reset_threshold field
Verify no hardcoded reset threshold of 3 remains as the sole option in coordinator
evidence: patterns.md state.json schema updated with context_reset_threshold field
coordinator.md reads context_reset_threshold from state.json
SKILL.md documents configurable threshold

features.title: Cost Tracking Implementation

features.title: Subjective Quality Grading Framework
features.description: Add rubric anchor system to SKILL.md and patterns.md. Enhance NN-evaluation.json schema with justification, prior_round_score, drift_check fields. Add evaluator-calibration.md template. Update evaluator for calibration creation on round 1 and comparative scoring.

features.title: Sprint Retrospective and Learning Loop
features.description: Add retrospective template to patterns.md. Update coordinator to generate retrospectives every N rounds (configurable via retro_interval in config.json) or after a FAIL. Store as .harness/sprints/retro-RX-RY.md. Coordinator reads latest retro before starting the next round.
steps: Verify patterns.md contains a retrospective template (retro-RX-RY.md)
Verify agents/coordinator.md documents retrospective generation every N rounds
Verify retro_interval is referenced from config.json
Verify coordinator generates retrospective after a FAIL
Verify retrospectives are stored as .harness/sprints/retro-RX-RY.md
Verify coordinator reads latest retro before starting next round

features.title: Feature Maturity Levels
features.description: Add maturity field (draft/functional/reviewed/polished/accepted) to features.json schema. Update evaluator to set maturity based on scores. Update SKILL.md with maturity level documentation.
